title: podostemum minus
intro: Podostemum minus, also known as the river weed or mudwort, is a semi-aquatic plant species belonging to the family Podostemaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Podostemum minus include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
